mapper.select: SELECT answer_id, user_id, question_id, content, created_at FROM ANSWER WHERE question_id = #{questionId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT answer_id, user_id, question_id, content, created_at FROM ANSWER WHERE answer_id = #{answerId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT answer_attachment_id, answer_id, s3_key, file_size, created_at FROM ANSWER_ATTACHMENT WHERE answer_id = #{answerId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE ANSWER_ATTACHMENT SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE answer_id IN ( SELECT answer_id FROM ANSWER WHERE question_id = #{questionId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ) AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE ANSWER SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE question_id = #{questionId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE ANSWER_ATTACHMENT SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE answer_id = #{answerId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE ANSWER SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE answer_id = #{answerId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ANSWER (user_id, question_id, content, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{questionId}, #{content}, NOW())
INSERT INTO ANSWER_ATTACHMENT (answer_id, s3_key, file_size, created_at) VALUES (#{answerId}, #{s3Key}, #{fileSize}, NOW())
